page_title: Tome of a Thousand Tales (G.I card)
text:
Tome of a Thousand Tales アドリブブック - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Tome of a Thousand Tales アドリブブック - This card summons forth a book which shows you a different story every time you open it. This item is useful for those who want to pass the time and like reading. The chances of reading the same story twice is very slim so once you close the book, you probably won't get that story again. If you want to continue reading the same story, you must use the special bookmark provided to save it.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.023 - アドリブブック 
毎回違った物語を楽しめる本。読書を中断する場合、付属のしおりをはさんでおかないと全然違う話に変わってしまうので要注意。
|-
![Eng]
|No.023 - Tome of a Thousand Tales 
A book where you can enjoy a different story every time. Watch out if you want to interrupt the reading because it will open a new story if you don't use the bookmark provided!
|}
